name: weather-agent
description: A weather agent that fetches weather information and provides forecasts

scripts.build: cd client && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:frontend:render: cd client && npm install && set VITE_API_BASE_URL=https://your-render-service.onrender.com&& npm run build
scripts.deploy:hybrid: echo 'Usage: npm run deploy:hybrid -- https://your-render-url.onrender.com' && npm run build:hybrid
scripts.build:hybrid: cd client && npm install && vite build --mode production
scripts.deploy:firebase: npm run build && firebase deploy --only hosting,functions
scripts.deploy:firebase:frontend: npm run build && firebase deploy --only hosting
